title: UK/Croatia: Agreement on Termination of the Agreement for the Promotion and Protection of Investments, done at London on 11 March 1997 [CS Croatia No.1/2024]
body: "Published title: Agreement between the Government of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland and the Government of the Republic of Croatia on the Termination of the Agreement between the Government of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland and the Government of the Republic of Croatia for the Promotion and Protection of Investments, done at London on 11 March 1997. "
